nodes.label: perennial puddle where my aunt broke her foot. There is now a safety mat that helps prevent people from slipping. It's an extremely slippery pad of concrete.
my cousins have had some beautiful breakfasts here among the flowers between 2008 and 2018

beautiful door that was purchased at a discount from home depot because it was damaged. Was bought to replace a cheaper door that had water damage from my grandma watering the sidewalk too often. She continues to water this sidewalk, slowly damaging the nice new door.
center pillar with calendar histogram of birthdates and anniversaries in the family
from around 2003 until a remodel around 2010 there was some jawbreaker stuck behind a cutting-board slot in the kitchen, I always wanted to try it but I could never get it out.

very exhaustive family portrait, before 2 marriages and 2 divorces. This was a composition formed by stitching the photos of several nuclear family units together. My leg is cut off as a result. Maybe 2010?
saint behind the glass smells coffee in the air
ancient pieta, arrived from italy to chicago sometime in the mid century, ended up in riverside county in the 80s, and was relocated to a convent near Rosarito BC around 2024.
